tracks.rawText: 3:14Studio Selectionv5.5CoverVals romántico latino, estilo bolero clásico de trío de guitarras, tempo lento a medio en compás 3/4, guitarras acústicas con rasgueo suave y arpegios elegantes, armonías vocales cálidas y nostálgicas, interpretación íntima y sentimental, atmósfera de serenata nocturna, melodía melancólica y apasionada, inspiración en valses y boleros tradicionales mexicanos de mediados del siglo XXPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:27[Rec] Apr 28 04:32:35UploadMariachi music featuring a prominent trumpet section and male vocals, The arrangement includes a vihuela playing rhythmic strumming patterns and a guitarrón providing the bassline, The trumpets play bright, staccato melodic flourishes in harmony, The tempo is 120 BPM in 4/4 time, The vocal delivery is energetic and traditional, utilizing a chest voice with occasional vibrato, The recording has a natural room reverb, typical of a live ensemble performancePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:18[Rec] Apr 28 04:28:55UploadAcoustic folk pop, A single acoustic guitar plays a rhythmic, percussive strumming pattern with palm-muted accents, Male vocals perform a melodic scat-style vocalization using syllables like da and na, The performance is captured with a close-mic technique, emphasizing the resonance of the guitar body and the breathiness of the vocals, The tempo is 115 BPM in 4/4 time, The vocal melody follows a repetitive, syncopated phrasing that mirrors the guitar rhythm1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:17Ride it LoveInv5.5CoverMystical techno house at 126 BPM with a driving four-on-the-floor kick, rubbery acid bass, and hypnotic offbeat hi-hats, Sparkling synth arpeggios, airy vocal chops, filtered pads, and staccato piano stabs create a secretive, late-night tension, Vocal harmonies bloom in the chorus; bass drops out briefly for a stripped, teasing breakdown2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:45🎵 Rola: "Pizza Vibes con Aude" 🎵v5.5CoverReggaeton track at 95 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm driven by a punchy kick and crisp snare, A syncopated, staccato synth lead plays a repetitive melodic hook, The bassline consists of deep, sub-heavy 808 slides that lock with the kick drum, Male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and rhythmic doubling, Percussive elements include woodblock-style hits and metallic rimshots, The track utilizes frequent silence gaps and sudden stops for rhythmic emphasis, A high-pitched, filtered synth pad provides harmonic texture in the background during transitions, Record scratch effects and vocal chops are used as transitional fills1PublishRemix
tracks.title: 🎵 Rola: "Pizza Vibes con Aude" 🎵
